title: Radar Chart Schema
description: Intermediate representation for radar (spider) chart diagrams. LLM extracts data from natural language into this format, then rendering pipeline generates HTML/SVG from it.

diagramType.description: Identifies this JSON as a radar chart. Must always be 'radar'.

title.description: Chart title, displayed at the top of the rendered page.

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle shown below the title.

style.description: Visual style preset. Each style has its own template and design rules.

format.description: Output format. HTML is the default. Radar charts do not support Mermaid output.

axes.description: Dimension axes radiating from the center. Each axis represents one evaluation dimension.

series.description: Data series. Each series is rendered as a filled polygon overlaid on the grid.

scaleLevels.description: Number of concentric polygon layers in the grid. Default is 5.

legend.description: Legend configuration. Auto-generated from series names if not provided.

colors.description: Optional color overrides for the style's environment colors (background, text, etc.). Does NOT affect data polygon colors — use series[].color for that.

metadata.description: Optional metadata. author field is for internal tracking only and MUST NOT be rendered into the output.

axisItem.description: A single dimension axis with a label and optional max value.

label.description: Axis dimension label displayed outside the perimeter.

maxValue.description: Maximum value for this axis. If specified, must be specified for ALL axes (all-or-nothing). If omitted for all axes, auto-calculated from series data.

seriesItem.description: A data series rendered as a filled polygon on the radar grid.

name.description: Series name displayed in the legend.

color.description: Optional color override for this series polygon. Must be 6-digit hex (#RRGGBB). If omitted, uses the chart palette.

fillOpacity.description: Fill opacity of the data polygon. Range 0.0 (transparent) to 0.5 (semi-opaque). Default 0.15.

data.description: Data values for each axis. Length must exactly match axes.length.

items.description: Value for this axis. Must be >= 0 and <= axes[i].maxValue.
